title: Docket on Renewable Fuel Standard Program: Partial Waiver of 2024 Cellulosic Biofuel Standard Published in Federal Register
content: The docket on EPA's proposal for the waiver of the cellulosic biofuel volume obligations for 2024 has been published in the Federal Register. EPA is proposing to partially waive the 2024 cellulosic biofuel volume requirement and revise the associated percentage standard under the Renewable Fuel Standard (RFS) program due to a shortfall in cellulosic biofuel production. As a result of this proposed change, this action also proposes to extend the RFS compliance reporting deadline for the 2024 compliance year. This action also proposes several minor revisions related to the biogas provisions of the RFS program. Comments on the proposed rule must be received on or before January 21, 2025. EPA will hold a virtual public hearing on December 20, 2024.
author: Analysts Account
